task: Go to the URL and complete the Wufoo-style form by filling in all required fields and submitting. If needed, create a file. Validate that the form was filled and submitted successfully. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/wufoo-style-form.html
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to the provided URL. It then proceeded to identify all required fields in the Wufoo-style form and filled them out correctly. This included filling the email address, selecting country, month, day, and year for the event date, checking the preferred contact radio button, and uploading a newly created file. Finally, the agent submitted the form and validated its successful submission by observing the 'Success! Form submitted successfully!' message on the page. The trajectory was efficient and accurate, demonstrating good tool usage and problem-solving.
